name: checkout-kiosk
description: Electron hardware bridge for the OWW checkout kiosk (NFC).

scripts._compile: npm run inject-build-config && npm run tsc:main && npm run tsc:renderer
scripts.build:kiosk:prod: node scripts/inject-build-config.mjs --prod && npm run tsc:main && npm run tsc:renderer && electron-builder --config electron-builder.kiosk.yml --win
scripts.typecheck: npm run inject-build-config && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p src/renderer/tsconfig.json
